name: Quicksilver
text: Super Speed — Response: After you use one of Quicksilver's basic powers (THW, ATK, or DEF), ready him. (Limit once per phase.)
real_text: Super Speed — Response: After you use one of Quicksilver's basic powers (THW, ATK, or DEF), ready him. (Limit once per phase.)

linked_card.name: Pietro Maximoff
linked_card.text: Superpowered Siblings — Action: Discard 2 cards from your hand → draw 2 cards (draw 3 cards instead if Wanda Maximoff is in play). (Limit once per round.)
linked_card.real_text: Superpowered Siblings — Action: Discard 2 cards from your hand → draw 2 cards (draw 3 cards instead if Wanda Maximoff is in play). (Limit once per round.)

name: Scarlet Witch
text: Interrupt: When you use one of Scarlet Witch's basic powers, discard the top card of the encounter deck. For each boost icon discarded this way, Scarlet Witch gets +1 to that power for this use.
real_text: Interrupt: When you use one of Scarlet Witch's basic powers, discard the top card of the encounter deck. For each boost icon discarded this way, Scarlet Witch gets +1 to that power for this use.

name: Always Be Running
text: Hero Action: Ready Quicksilver.
real_text: Hero Action: Ready Quicksilver.

name: Double Time
text: Hero Action: Choose two of the following (you may choose the same option twice): - Deal 2 damage to an enemy. - Remove 2 threat from a scheme.
real_text: Hero Action: Choose two of the following (you may choose the same option twice): - Deal 2 damage to an enemy. - Remove 2 threat from a scheme.

name: Maximum Velocity
text: Max 1 per phase. Hero Action: You get +2 THW, +2 ATK, and +2 DEF until the end of the round.
real_text: Max 1 per phase. Hero Action: You get +2 THW, +2 ATK, and +2 DEF until the end of the round.

name: Speed Cyclone
text: Hero Action: Stun X Enemies.
real_text: Hero Action: Stun X Enemies.

name: Serval Industries
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Serval Industries → shuffle 2 Quicksilver cards from your discard pile into your deck.
real_text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Serval Industries → shuffle 2 Quicksilver cards from your discard pile into your deck.
flavor: Corporate sponsors of the superhero team known as X-Factor.

name: Accelerated Reflex
text: Quicksilver gets +1 DEF.
real_text: Quicksilver gets +1 DEF.

name: Friction Resistance
text: Hero Response: After you ready Quicksilver, ready this card. Resource: Exhaust Friction Resistance → generate a [physical] resource.
real_text: Hero Response: After you ready Quicksilver, ready this card. Resource: Exhaust Friction Resistance → generate a [physical] resource.

name: Hyper Perception
text: Quicksilver gets +1 THW.
real_text: Quicksilver gets +1 THW.
flavor: "Surely you can do better than that." —Quicksilver

name: Reinforced Sinew
text: Quicksilver gets +1 ATK.
real_text: Quicksilver gets +1 ATK.
flavor: "The future is written by the winners." —Quicksilver

name: Multiple Man
text: Response: After Multiple Man enters play, search your deck and hand for a copy of Multiple Man and put it into play. Shuffle your deck if it was searched this way.
real_text: Response: After Multiple Man enters play, search your deck and hand for a copy of Multiple Man and put it into play. Shuffle your deck if it was searched this way.

name: Warlock
text: Action: Spend a [mental] resource → heal up to 2 damage from Warlock.
real_text: Action: Spend a [mental] resource → heal up to 2 damage from Warlock.
flavor: "Self thinks this is a mistake. But then, self is very young and knows very little."

name: Never Back Down
text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When you defend against an attack, you get +2 DEF for this attack. If you take no damage from this attack, stun the attacking enemy.
real_text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When you defend against an attack, you get +2 DEF for this attack. If you take no damage from this attack, stun the attacking enemy.

name: Side Step
text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When you would take any amount of damage, prevent 3 of that damage. If you paid for this card using [energy] resource, deal 1 damage to that enemy.
real_text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When you would take any amount of damage, prevent 3 of that damage. If you paid for this card using [energy] resource, deal 1 damage to that enemy.

name: Need for Speed
text: Give to the Pietro Maximoff player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Pietro Maximoff → remove Need for Speed from the game. • Exhaust your identity. You cannot ready your identity until your next turn ends. Discard this obligation.
real_text: Give to the Pietro Maximoff player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Pietro Maximoff → remove Need for Speed from the game. • Exhaust your identity. You cannot ready your identity until your next turn ends. Discard this obligation.

name: Extortion of Seismic Proportion
text: Incite 1. (When revealed, place 1 threat on the main scheme.)
real_text: Incite 1. (When revealed, place 1 threat on the main scheme.)

name: Avalanche
text: Incite 2. (When revealed, place 2 threat on the main scheme.) When Revealed: Each player must choose to either take 2 indirect damage or exhaust their identity. (Quicksilver's nemesis minion.)
real_text: Incite 2. (When revealed, place 2 threat on the main scheme.) When Revealed: Each player must choose to either take 2 indirect damage or exhaust their identity. (Quicksilver's nemesis minion.)

name: Vibration Resistance
text: Attach to Avalanche, if able. If you cannot, attach to the villain. Reduce the damage attached enemy takes from each attack by 1. Hero Action: Exhaust your hero → discard this card.
real_text: Attach to Avalanche, if able. If you cannot, attach to the villain. Reduce the damage attached enemy takes from each attack by 1. Hero Action: Exhaust your hero → discard this card.

name: Brute Force

name: United We Stand
text: Play only if your identity has the [[Avenger]] trait. Hero Action: Heal 1 damage from up to X friendly characters (to a maximum of 3 characters), where X is equal to the villain's stage number.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[Avenger]] trait. Hero Action: Heal 1 damage from up to X friendly characters (to a maximum of 3 characters), where X is equal to the villain's stage number.
